row.Name: https://sql-page.com/
row.Hint: SQLPage turns SQL queries into interactive web pages, forms, maps, and dashboards.

row.Name: https://fullconvert.com/
row.Hint: Full Convert is industry standard for database migration. Over 40 database formats supported with unparalleled speed, ease of use, and migration customization.

row.Name: SQL Online IDE
row.Hint: Next-Gen AI Development Environment | 10+ years of superior SLA, Performance & UX

row.Name: Corporate License
row.Hint: full access, local deployment, no external servers, for businesses and educational institutions

row.Name: https://t.me/s/sqliteonlinecom
row.Hint: Telegram channel with news about the project

row.Name: Export
row.Hint: [RightClick] mouse on Table OR It’s now the first one at the bottom right of the table.

row.Name: Chart
row.Hint: LINE-SELECT name, cos(id), sin(id) FROM demo;

row.Name: Short CODE
row.Hint: s* tableName => SELECT * FROM tableName sf tableName => SELECT columns FROM tableName sc tableName => SELECT count(*) FROM tableName sl tableName => SELECT * FROM tableName ORDER BY key DESC LIMIT 100; ct => CREATE TABLE ii tableName => INSERT INTO us tableName => UPDATE SET uw tableName => UPDATE SET WHERE df tableName => DELETE FROM dw tableName => DELETE FROM WHERE

row.Name: ai.Image
row.Hint: Blob - png, jpg, gif or String(base64) [DbClick] row

row.Name: UPDATE
row.Hint: UPDATE table_name SET col1="work" WHERE col2="test"
